issue: User cannot reset their password, reset link expires immediately
resolution: Password reset links expire after 15 minutes. Instructed user to request a new link and complete reset within the time window. Escalate to engineering if expiry occurs under 15 minutes.

issue: Payment was charged twice for the same order
resolution: Verified duplicate charge in payment logs. Issued refund for the duplicate transaction and flagged for the billing team to check for a webhook retry bug.

issue: App crashes when uploading a profile picture larger than 5MB
resolution: Confirmed file size limit is not enforced client-side. Advised user to resize image under 5MB as a workaround. Logged as a bug for the frontend team to add validation.

issue: How do I change my email notification preferences?
resolution: Walked user through Settings > Notifications > toggle desired categories. No escalation needed.

issue: Order shows as delivered but customer never received the package
resolution: Filed a claim with the shipping carrier and issued a provisional refund pending investigation. Advised customer of 5-7 business day resolution window.

issue: Two-factor authentication code never arrives via SMS
resolution: Confirmed carrier delay on SMS delivery. Offered authenticator app as an alternative 2FA method and provided setup steps.

issue: Subscription renewed after user cancelled it last month
resolution: Found cancellation was submitted after the billing cycle cutoff. Issued a full refund as a one-time courtesy and confirmed cancellation is now active.

issue: Dashboard charts fail to load, shows blank white space
resolution: Identified as a known issue with ad-blockers interfering with the charting library. Advised whitelisting the domain; logged for engineering to add a fallback renderer.

issue: How do I export my data to CSV?
resolution: Directed user to Reports > Export > CSV. Confirmed export includes all historical data by default.

issue: Package delivered to wrong address despite correct shipping info
resolution: Confirmed shipping label had correct address; carrier misdelivery. Filed carrier claim and shipped a replacement at no cost.

issue: Account locked after multiple failed login attempts
resolution: Verified lockout was triggered by security policy after 5 failed attempts. Unlocked account after identity verification and reset password.

issue: Invoice PDF shows incorrect tax amount
resolution: Identified a regional tax rate misconfiguration. Issued a corrected invoice and flagged the tax table for the finance team to update.

issue: Search feature returns no results for valid queries
resolution: Found search index was stale due to a failed reindex job. Manually triggered reindex and confirmed search results returned correctly.

issue: How do I add a team member to my workspace?
resolution: Directed user to Workspace Settings > Members > Invite. Confirmed invited members receive an email with a signup link.

issue: Tracking number shows no movement for over a week
resolution: Contacted carrier for status update; package was delayed at a sorting facility. Provided customer with updated ETA and carrier contact info.

issue: User wants to merge two duplicate accounts
resolution: Verified ownership of both accounts via email confirmation. Escalated to engineering team for manual account merge, as this requires backend access.

issue: Refund was approved but funds never appeared in bank account
resolution: Confirmed refund was processed on our end 6 business days ago. Advised customer refunds can take 5-10 business days depending on their bank, and to contact their bank if not received after 10 days.

issue: Mobile app freezes on the checkout screen
resolution: Reproduced issue on iOS 17 with a specific payment method selected. Logged as a critical bug for the mobile team with reproduction steps attached.

issue: How do I downgrade my subscription plan?
resolution: Directed user to Billing > Plan > Change Plan. Explained downgrade takes effect at the start of the next billing cycle.

issue: Customer received wrong item in their order
resolution: Confirmed warehouse packing error via order photos. Shipped correct item with expedited shipping and provided a prepaid return label for the wrong item.
